textByHashes.af82c1a3de4ccfa36cc99ca50f34b2a6fe6efd0a: Who are you? Did Glough send you?
textByHashes.dcfb8665daeb469a460fa3ba60f3c0281518d057: Royal Guard? I know nothing about them. Absolutely nothing.
textByHashes.b6d3cfae30e7b338e9ebd5297734f30d61870ad1: None whatsoever. What were they here to do?
textByHashes.656d43d3711d8781c30a4875f98822de31131fd3: Decommission the shipyard... I see. Well, we have had some seriously strong southerly winds of late. They may have been blown off course during flight.
textByHashes.cc78052c74fe6de1085ef8819afceb38334a1825: I shall personally see to the decommission. You should report to the King immediately.
textByHashes.ce8d15831b6d385f3738800f1aa2a27719c2531c: Why are you still here? You should report immediately to the King!
textByHashes.9a71cb43bf4071de5112b52f9f522f171cb61d04: Stop worrying. I'm working on something -
textByHashes.48f81eb813a22d8af76bd7c445ff6dbdc464183b: The human means nothing. If it becomes too much trouble, I will simply have it ... removed. In the meantime, let it continue to search for that blasted 10th squad.
textByHashes.4e277497a864302fbcac22ae8f231eea0b0548df: Stop worrying. I'm working on something - Glough left a few of his agents in the Gnome airforce.
textByHashes.25834750ab661d76f32a96b405648b97c1ed27d7: For now, tell your men to continue work on the battleships. Give me some time.
textByHashes.9c2a6ff6bc58978cf98fb6509d94dab78635f52f: It is good of you to meet me, Waydar.
textByHashes.0ffd8d54eaadd72b86fe61d1eadc99bfc1c0c65e: Well observed. How have you been keeping yourself occupied?
textByHashes.509917685c4f1db676e38a2584213e6e172ad836: My my. How things have changed somewhat since Glough's time... Now, what of the human?
textByHashes.d8c4ed6008b75585f5ac8331da15597fbc24938f: You may be right. Never mind - there are greater matters afoot. With Glough gone, it falls to us to continue with his plans.
textByHashes.1f6f41fda10df56176dbd9e8fc029be198ca80cf: Also, the shipyard workers are becoming restless.
textByHashes.db3c9112b7f6ae2b1f5d1e3192bc9fe98ea0d6b9: Money for me, Waydar, and promotion for you. As you know, the 10th squad of the Royal Guard are slightly worse for wear on this island.
textByHashes.286ded7992cd917a1b6ae6870e2b0566e3fbe72d: What if they were to die? An entire squad of the Royal Guard goes missing in the jungle of Karamja ... We could blame it on the humans.
textByHashes.c6b754178eec912a4502b65caff80d3b137fb50c: Precisely. He might even order an invasion. At the very least he'll step up the defence. More orders for me, promotion for you.
textByHashes.295f682edb4e30d0728fe32b90b52d50e566c862: Ah yes - all that trouble with the Khazard. Last I heard, Bolren had retrieved the orbs of protection. Apparently some human lent their assistance.
textByHashes.0005523f77c2bd953fa7ee50d2bac952aa138ef9: I agree. Anyhow, we don't want your human wondering as to your whereabouts. When the time is right, don't hesitate to ... dispose of it.
textByHashes.631db51d2310fbbc956cf1120b3c98e87ce584d0: Would it not be easier if they were somehow just to ... die?
textByHashes.adfbecfac82aa94530836967e9d1ad43f7215e59: I can assure you he will not. We will lay the blame at the humans' feet.
textByHashes.20338ce5ad36c58295e221a2152f61a7b2849313: Narnode will indeed declare war: not against you, but against humankind.
textByHashes.27083687c7f704e2cb824013206307997a055757: Kill the foot soldiers and the rest of the 10th squad. My superior has sent you a few tricks which may prove useful.
textByHashes.086a002c2dc907b6c6ec5ebe87e48d919862dd0d: High magic: the ability to summon the entire 10th squad to a single location. And -
textByHashes.8a7273e0b4da9e162e684555d5f5f4285d7786a6: Yes. And of course, you will also receive access to one of his 'pets'.
textByHashes.aa346f82a2927ace9f24f67a70d75af05bc03e07: You must be careful with these, as you have only one use of each. Ensure you set your trap well - none must survive lest they spread the truth.
textByHashes.9a4ef863c4e615ae4af289c9dafce80634d71601: Ignore him. My colleague's official mission was to look after a human in the area, but don't worry: it is probably dead already.
textByHashes.e5405ed9ed5c9b1edff134c9488803def068176b: Ignore her. My colleague's official mission was to look after a human in the area, but don't worry: it is probably dead already.
textByHashes.a5d60b3d55c87ca3bb2394cfe4038c0c05be855d: Ignore them. My colleague's official mission was to look after a human in the area, but don't worry: it is probably dead already.
textByHashes.bf8d680d0e7c965186f7b95b6caacaec90b88047: Get out of my office! We WILL have our revenge, human!
textByHashes.4c26fafae1374bf3c4f136cb8d546d77ae6d36d6: Just hand over the order human.
textByHashes.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
